ab: Yawi ralu’ naka rangi’ mu caṟung, ule’ na Itaṟal ka hiya’ uṟi.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Yawi，他也是泰雅族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Yawi, and he is also an Tayal child.

ch: 我們一起在萬大部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Plngawan tribe.

ab: magaluw min manapung kumaṟal ci insa’ na nabkis rali’ cika nabkis alang. ba’ min kumaṟal caṟung ci ke’ na Itaṟal.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說泰雅語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Tayal proficiently.

ab: babawi’ ci katuhuṟ cu kung, mahikang ci lalabu’ ka Yawi’.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Yawi很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Yawi is short and thin.

ab: matakalang caṟung ka Yawi, kisli’ naha caṟung.
ch: Yawi很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Yawi is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
